title: Unexpected type error in Postgres Memory node
symptom: When testing a workflow with the Postgres Memory node, n8n outputs 'Got unexpected type: undefined'. This prevents the workflow from executing properly.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node or integration
root_cause: The error occurs due to an issue with the memory table used by the Postgres Memory node. If the table is corrupted or improperly configured, it can lead to unexpected types being returned during execution.
fix_steps: Access the database where the memory table is stored
Allow n8n to recreate the memory table automatically
agent_instruction: Delete the existing memory table and let n8n recreate it.
